title: Product defect recall alert for four products by Dechra Pharmaceuticals PLC
body: "We wish to inform wholesalers that Dechra Pharmaceuticals PLC has initiated a Class II recall to wholesaler level with immediate effect for the following products:    Apovomin 3 mg/ml Solution for Injection for Dogs, Vm50406/4002   Ophtocycline 10 mg/g eye ointment for dogs, cats and horses, Vm41821/4043   Revozyn RTU 400 mg/ml suspension for injection for cattle, Vm16849/3000 & Vm16849/5000   Equipalazone 200 mg/ml Solution for Injection Vm50406/3037 & Vm50406/5042    The reason for the recall is due to an increased risk of microbial contamination in the aseptically manufactured products at the site of the contracted manufacturer, in the period from 01/2024 to 05/2025.  This recall is for following batches:     Product Batch number Date of Manufacture Expiry date     Apovomin 3 mg/ml solution for injection for dogs 24K017 Nov 2024 Oct 2027   Apovomin 3 mg/ml solution for injection for dogs 25B254 Feb 2025 Jan 2028   Ophtocycline 10 mg/g eye ointment for dogs, cats and horses EB Jan 2024 Dec 2025   Ophtocycline 10 mg/g eye ointment for dogs, cats and horses ED May 2024 Apr 2026   Ophtocycline 10 mg/g eye ointment for dogs, cats and horses EF May 2024 Apr 2026   Ophtocycline 10 mg/g eye ointment for dogs, cats and horses FA Jan 2025 Dec 2026   Ophtocycline 10 mg/g eye ointment for dogs, cats and horses FC May 2025 Apr 2027   Revozyn RTU 400 mg/ml suspension for injection for cattle 24J014 Oct 2024 Sep 2026   Equipalazone 200 mg/ml Solution for Injection 151300 April 2024 Mar 2027   Equipalazone 200 mg/ml Solution for Injection 152435 April 2024 Mar 2027     Dechra Pharmaceuticals PLC is contacting wholesalers to examine inventory immediately and quarantine products, subject to this recall.  For further information regarding the recall, please contact: quality@dechra.com, or eu.recall@dechra.com "
